zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Kent於1665年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州時，她的父親Robert Kent33歲，母親Margaret Anderson21歲。她於1685年3月16日與John Maddox在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1718年12月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特聖 彼得斯 馬吉斯特利亞爾 迪斯特利可特享年53歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特聖 比特也斯 帕里什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Kent于1665年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州时，她的父亲Robert Kent33岁，母亲Margaret Anderson21岁。她于1685年3月16日与John Maddox在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1718年12月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特聖 彼得斯 馬吉斯特利亞爾 迪斯特利可特享年53岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州劍橋大學默里 肯特聖 比特也斯 帕里什。

nameMeanings.name: Kent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from the county of Kent. The surname is also established in Ireland, where English bearers of this name settled in Meath, in the 13th century. The name has been Gaelicized as Ceannt.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Kent was born in 1665, in Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Robert Kent, was 33 and her mother, Margaret Anderson, was 21. She married John Maddox on 16 March 1685, in Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 31 December 1718, in St. Peters Magisterial District, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 53, and was buried in St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Kent est née en 1665, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Robert Kent, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Anderson, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Maddox le 16 mars 1685, à Charles, Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 décembre 1718, à St. Peters Magisterial District, New Kent, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Kent 1665 in Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Kent 33 und ihre Mutter Margaret Anderson 21. Sie hat am 16. März 1685 in Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America John Maddox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Dezember 1718 im Alter von 53 Jahren in St. Peters Magisterial District, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Kent è nata il nel 1665 nel Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, Robert Kent, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margaret Anderson, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Maddox il 16 marzo 1685, nel Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1718, nel St. Peters Magisterial District, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Kentが1665年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州で生まれた時，父Robert Kentは33歳，母Margaret Andersonは21歳であった。1685年3月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州チャーレスでJohn Maddoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1718年12月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ニュー ケントスト. ペテルズ マジステリアル ディストリクトで53歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ニュー ケントスト. ペテル'ス パーイッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Kent(이)가 1665년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Kent(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Anderson(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1685년 3월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스에서 John Maddox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1718년 12월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 뉴 켄트 스트. 페테르스 매지스테리앨 디스트릭트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 뉴 켄트 스트. 피터'스 파리시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Kent nasceu em 1665, em Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Robert Kent, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Anderson, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Maddox em 16 de março de 1685, em Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1718, em St. Peters Magisterial District, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Kent родилась в 1665 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Robert Kent было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Anderson, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maddox 16 марта 1685 г. в местности чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 31 декабря 1718 г. в местности ст. питирс магистиряль дистрикт, ню кэнт, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности ст. питир'с пэриш, ню кэнт, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Kent nació en 1665, en Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Robert Kent, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Anderson, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Maddox el 16 de marzo de 1685, en Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1718, en St. Peters Magisterial District, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
